ham.subject: Out of Office: John Doe – Back on 10/12
ham.body:
Hello,

I am currently out of the office and will return on 10/12. I will have limited access to email during this period.

For urgent matters, please contact my colleague, Jane Smith, at jane.smith@company.com.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
John Doe

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Scholarship Award Requires Immediate Verification
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! The University of Avalon has selected you as a recipient of the 2026 Global Leadership Scholarship. This award is fully funded and covers tuition, living expenses, and travel.

To claim your scholarship, you must complete a quick verification process within 48 hours. Please click the link below and provide the required personal information and a one‑time processing fee of $150.

<URL>

Failure to verify within the deadline will result in automatic forfeiture of the scholarship. This is a mandatory step in accordance with the University's award policy.

If you have any questions, reply to this email or contact the Office of Admissions at admissions@avalon.edu.

Sincerely,
Dr. Emily Smith
Office of Admissions
University of Avalon
